title: Kondapalli Toy Festival Begins With Grandeur, Showcasing Timeless Craft
description: The festival also saw participation from several key officials, including former ZP chairperson Gadde Anuradha, state language and culture department director Regulla Mallikarjuna Rao, district tourism officer A. Shilpa, regional director Y.V. Prasanna, and DEO L. Chandrakala: Reports
